req-auth-001.description: Provider-agnostic AuthService interface that abstracts authentication operations (signUp, signIn, signOut, getSession, onAuthStateChange)

req-auth-002.description: SupabaseAuthProvider implementation of AuthService interface with email/password support

req-auth-003.description: MST AuthStore model tracking current user, session state, loading/error states

req-auth-004.description: AuthService injected via MST environment for testability and provider swapping

req-auth-005.description: React hooks/context for consuming auth state in apps/web components

req-auth-006.description: MockAuthProvider for testing without Supabase credentials

req-auth-007.description: Protected route component or hook for guarding authenticated routes
